title: The Zombie Lion
lines: A massive, rotted lion leaps from the shadows of its enclosure. Its mane is matted with dry gore, and its eyes glow with a sickly yellow light.
It lets out a gutteral, wet roar and prepares to pounce. There is no running from this beast; it is faster than any human.

options.desc: 1. Swing the Barbed-Wire Bat with everything you've got
2. Try to intimidate the lion by shouting
3. Turn and run for the exit
